mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_class WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_class(class_name, major, grade, create_time, del_flag) VALUES(#{className}, #{major}, #{grade}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_class SET del_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_class WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
